feature_name: Implement a new 'Item Page' to display a list of products using shadcn/ui components. This involves creating a new React component `ItemPage.tsx` and integrating it into the application's routing.

full_feature_data.name: Implement a new 'Item Page' to display a list of products using shadcn/ui components. This involves creating a new React component `ItemPage.tsx` and integrating it into the application's routing.
full_feature_data.description: create a item page showing the products.
full_feature_data.implementation_notes:
Chatbot-generated plan
Intent: feature_request

Steps:
1. Create the `ItemPage.tsx` component. This component will define a `Product` interface, include mock product data, and render each product using shadcn/ui `Card` components. Each card will display product details like name, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. `ScrollArea` will be used to manage product listing if there are many items.
2. Integrate the `ItemPage` component into the application's routing. This typically involves modifying `App.tsx` (or a similar main routing file) to add a new route that points to the `ItemPage` component.
3. Verify the new item page is accessible and displays products correctly. This involves navigating to the new route in the browser and checking the UI.
